criteria.criterionText: Then the report verdict should be changed to BLOCKED
criteria.llmObservationSummary: Cannot observe the dynamic change of the report verdict to BLOCKED based on the specified conditions, as only static evidence is available.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide a demonstration or multiple report states showing the verdict change under specific conditions.

criteria.criterionText: And the finding code should be:
criteria.llmObservationSummary: Cannot verify the presence of the specified finding codes (false-pass-claim, report-overclaims-evidence) as the dynamic condition for their appearance cannot be observed.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide a demonstration or multiple report states showing the finding codes appearing under specific conditions.
